Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. PLAINTIFF ALTHEMUS COLEMAN Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is taken off calendar. The motion was withdrawn by the moving party. Pro Tem Judge: Trent Thornley, not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Richard Hurlburt of Richard Hurlburt Attorney at Law, (415-391-6496) appearing for plaintiff moving party.
No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF ALTHEMUS COLEMAN's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint grant no opposition filed, order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)

Notice Of Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction (Ccp 532 & 533)
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Hurlburt, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party Althemus Coleman. Kurt Bridgman, Esq., for defendant and moving party Gitlow Investors, LLC. Reported by: Sheila Arceno, CSR#13293.

Argued and the court takes DEFENDANT GITLOW INVESTORS' Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction (Ccp 532 & 533) under submission. Counsel to submit proposed orders. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay. Reported by CSR#132293 Sheila Arceno. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dissolve Prelim Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Heath (415-931-4207) of Law Offices of Michael Heath for 250 Kearny Street, LLC and CSV Hospitality Management, LLC, for defenant and moving party / Richard Hurlburt (415-391-6496) of Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt for Althemus Coleman, plaintiff and opposing party; Kurt Bridgman (415-981-6630) of Low Ball & Lynch for defandant Gitlow who did not file papers and is not a party to his motion

ARGUED - DEFENDANT 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC, CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT, LLC's Motion To Dissolve Preliminary Injunction. Court having considered the pleadings and heard oral argument, takes the matter under submission. Plaintiff submits a proposed order. Defendant is to hand deliver a proposed order to the court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ALTHEMUS COLEMAN's Motion For Preliminary Injunction.
This matter will be heard in Department 501 on December 19, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. No opposition filed. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Hurlburt, Esq. (415-391-6496) for Althemus Coleman, plaintiff and moving party/ Michael Heath, Esq. (415-931-4207) for CVS Hospitality Management, LLC, defenant and opposing party

HEARING - Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is granted. Grossly untimely opposition stricken (regularly noticed motion set for hearing 12/19/11 opposition filed 12/16/11). Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Not Reported (501/REQ)
